sessionStart.bash: gh hookflow check-setup || echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️ hookflow not configured. Run: gh extension install htekdev/gh-hookflow && gh hookflow init"}'
sessionStart.comment: Ensure gh hookflow extension is installed and configured
sessionStart.powershell: gh hookflow check-setup; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output '{"systemMessage":"hookflow not configured. Run: gh extension install htekdev/gh-hookflow; gh hookflow init"}' }
